title: Fix dashboard Next config/runtime regressions after Next upgrade

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Investigating invalid next.config eslint key + Turbopack/webpack mismatch breaking dev:web and Amplify dashboard build.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented remediation for local/Amplify Next runtime failures: removed unsupported next.config.js eslint key; updated scripts to explicitly use webpack (dev:web, build, build:fast). Validation: npm run dev:web starts cleanly in webpack mode; npm run build:fast completes successfully.
